canonical_db_path_policy: canonical lottery_api/data/lottery_v2.db (gitignored, absent in worktrees) opened read-only mode=ro + PRAGMA query_only=ON, single connection

diversity_constraint.on_infeasible: mark draw UNDERFILLED (never relax, never replace)

eligibility_and_exclusion_rules.exclude: target_draw absent from canonical view (no canonical outcome)
eligibility_and_exclusion_rules.include: replay_status='PREDICTED' AND target_draw in canonical view

group_definitions.A_INDEPENDENT_RANDOM: B_d i.i.d. uniform 6/49 tickets; natural duplicates/overlap allowed
group_definitions.B_DIVERSIFIED_RANDOM: B_d random tickets with pairwise main-overlap <= 2; rejection sampling (<= 4000 attempts/ticket); UNDERFILLED rather than relaxing the constraint
group_definitions.C_RAW_DETERMINISTIC_PORTFOLIO: frozen per-draw strategy replay tickets, as stored (no outcome-based re-rank or selection)
group_definitions.D_DEDUPLICATED_DETERMINISTIC_PORTFOLIO: Group C with exact-duplicate canonical ticket contents removed; no replacement; reduced-budget draws marked UNDERFILLED

primary_comparison_d_vs_a.budget_policy: EQUAL budget U_d for both D and the A baseline
primary_comparison_d_vs_a.method: paired same-draw observations; D fixed (U_d unique deterministic tickets) vs A budget-matched at U_d i.i.d. random; seed-fixed Bernoulli Monte Carlo over EXACT per-draw success probabilities, with a normal-approximation cross-check (using the exact Poisson-binomial mean/std); one-sided test for D above the random baseline

prize_aware_endpoint.definition: BIG draw-level success: any portfolio ticket with main_hits>=3 OR (main_hits==2 AND special_hit)
prize_aware_endpoint.special_hit_definition: actual special number present in the predicted six

recommendation_next_research_step: No edge: deduplication reduces duplicate exposure / wasted budget but does not beat the matched random baseline. Treat dedup as a budget-efficiency control only; HOLD per maintenance mode (L90/L91). No further mining without a new external data source or explicit authorization.

c_vs_a.method: paired; C (=D success) vs full-budget B_d random baseline

c_vs_b.method: paired; C vs full-budget diversified-random baseline

d_vs_b.method: paired; D vs diversified-random baseline matched at U_d (B success prob estimated by resampling)

ALL.method: descriptive (D is the unique subset of C; removing exact duplicates cannot change the winning set)

LONG.method: descriptive (D is the unique subset of C; removing exact duplicates cannot change the winning set)

MID.method: descriptive (D is the unique subset of C; removing exact duplicates cannot change the winning set)

SHORT.method: descriptive (D is the unique subset of C; removing exact duplicates cannot change the winning set)

limitations: Retrospective replay over historical draws; NOT prospective / out-of-sample.
Deduplication cannot raise draw-level success vs the raw portfolio (D's winning set equals C's); any gain is budget/duplicate-exposure only.
Diversified-random success probability is estimated (resampling), not closed-form; D-vs-B / C-vs-B are secondary.
21 replay target_draws excluded as non-canonical (no canonical outcome).
statistical_method_and_limitations.primary_test: seed-fixed Bernoulli Monte Carlo (paired by draw) + normal-approximation cross-check using the exact Poisson-binomial mean/std; one-sided (fixed > random)

target_draw_universe.definition: BIG_LOTTO strategy_prediction_replays target_draws that join to draws_big_lotto_canonical_main (canonical 6/49 main draws)

ticket_canonicalization_rules: sorted tuple of 6 distinct ints in [1,49]; malformed tickets raise; identity = canonical content
underfilled_policy: Group D underfilled by removed exact duplicates; Group B underfilled if the diversity constraint cannot be satisfied within max_attempts. Underfilled draws are reported and never silently repaired or backfilled.
window_definition: most-recent N eligible draws (by CAST(draw AS INTEGER) DESC)
